success: Success! The email address {email} has been unsubscribed from daily reminder emails.

client_error.title: Error encountered while trying to unsubscribe.
client_error.p1: The unsubscribe link that was used to reach this page is probably expired.
client_error.p2: This happens when someone has unsubscribed then subscribed again, creating a new subscription.
client_error.p3: Please follow the unsubscribe link in the most recent email or update your preferences.

server_error.p1: The unsubscribe link that was used to reach this page is expired.
server_error.p2: This happens when someone has unsubscribed then subscribed again, creating a new subscription.
server_error.p3: Please follow the unsubscribe link in the most recent email or sign in to update your preferences.

unsubscribing_you: Unsubscribing you from daily reminder emails...
there_was_an_error: There was an error during the unsubscribe process.
